evidence.evidence_text: 2.2. Synthesis of gold nanoparticles Gold nanoparticles of 35, 70 and 200 nm average sizes were synthesized by the previously published method pioneered by Turkevich et al., depending on reducing hydrogen tetrachloroau- rate with sodium tricitrate (Turkevich et al., 1951).

record.title: Formulation of carbapenems loaded gold nanoparticles to combat

evidence.evidence_text: Synthesis of gold nanoparticles Gold nanoparticles of 35, 70 and 200 nm average sizes were synthesized by the previously published method pioneered by Turkevich et al., depending on reducing hydrogen tetrachloroau- rate with sodium tricitrate (Turkevich et al., 1951). All the glass tools used in the preparation were washed first by aqua regia (3:1 v/v solution of conc HCl and conc HNO ) 3 and then rinsed with deionized water for three times and dried before usage.

evidence.evidence_text: 2.3. Preparation of gold nanoparticles-carbapenem antibiotic conjugates Carbapenem conjugated gold nanoparticles were prepared by introducing 5 mL of the antibiotics (1 mg/mL in PBS, pH = 7.4) drop wise to the stirred 10 mL of the synthesized gold nanoparticles (0.1 mg/ml in PBS, pH = 7.4).

evidence.evidence_text: Time kill assay of Klebsiella pneumoniae (K5.0) treated with: (A) free imipenem (Ipm) and 35 nm diameter imipenem loaded gold nanoparticles (Ipm-GNPs35); (B) free meropenem (Mem) and 35 nm diameter meropenem loaded gold nanoparticles (Mem-GNPs35), compared to control antibiotic free culture.

record.title: Formulation of carbapenems loaded gold nanoparticles to combat

evidence.evidence_text: Time kill assay of Klebsiella pneumoniae (K5.0) treated with: (A) free imipenem (Ipm) and 35 nm diameter imipenem loaded gold nanoparticles (Ipm-GNPs35); (B) free meropenem (Mem) and 35 nm diameter meropenem loaded gold nanoparticles (Mem-GNPs35), compared to control antibiotic free culture.

record.title: Formulation of carbapenems loaded gold nanoparticles to combat

evidence.evidence_text: (B) free meropenem (Mem) and 35 nm diameter meropenem loaded gold nanoparticles (Mem-GNPs35), compared to control antibiotic free culture. Ipm-GNPs35and Mem-GNPs35at a concentration of 2.5 mg/ml inhibited viable bacterial growth within 10 and 4 h respectively.

record.title: Formulation of carbapenems loaded gold nanoparticles to combat

evidence.evidence_text: Ipm-GNPs35and Mem-GNPs35at a concentration of 2.5 mg/ml inhibited viable bacterial growth within 10 and 4 h respectively. *means significant M.A.
